description: Product description Features: Easy install, convenienct to use. Economic benefits, high cost comparison, durable. It is suitable for making a low grass, so that the grass grows more neatly. Fits most brush cutters- including Michigan, MTM, Bauholtz, BBT, Dynamic Power Baumr-AG and more. Specification: Color: Black Caliber: 10mm Material: Hardened Plastic Package Included: 1X Trimmer Head Safety Warning Always wear appropriate safety gear, including eye protection and sturdy gloves. Keep bystanders at a safe distance. Do not use on wet grass or in reverse. Inspect the area before use to remove any debris or obstacles.
